title: App Shell Decomposition — Extract Pages, Components, Hooks
purpose: Decompose src/App.tsx (1,832 lines) into a route-driven shell with extracted pages, presentational components, and data hooks. Eliminate God-component anti-pattern.
design_intent: One page, one primary decision. Keep App.tsx as a thin dispatcher (~50 lines): sidebar nav, header bar, and <Outlet> or route-based conditional rendering. All data fetching, forms, charts, and modals live in their own files.

in_scope: Extract ObserverControlState, AutoPublisherControlState, PublisherControlState, ControlPanelState types to src/lib/controlPanel.ts
Extract applyRuntimePreset, gapPolicySourceLabel, stripTaggedErrorPrefix to src/lib/controlPanel.ts
Extract all fetch* closures and polling logic into custom hooks (useAppData, usePublisherPoll)
Extract LogDetailModal and OverrideConfirmModal to src/components/
Extract OverviewPage (KPI strip, trend chart, publisher runs log, pipeline canvas)
Extract ControlsPage (runtime control panel with observer/scheduler/publisher tabs)
Extract OperationsPage (competitor table, post velocity chart, activity log, drafts)
Extract sub-components: KpiStrip, TrendInsightsChart, ControlPanelForm, CompetitorTable, DraftCards, PublisherRunsLog, AppSidebar
out_of_scope: No changes to backend API contracts (server.ts endpoints unchanged)
No visual/UX redesign — preserve existing Tailwind classes and motion animations
No state management library migration (stay with useState/useEffect)
PipelineCanvas.tsx already extracted — no changes needed

constraints: Zero visual regression — component output must match current App.tsx rendering exactly
No changes to API endpoint URLs or request/response shapes
All extracted files must use existing import conventions (relative paths, no path aliases)
controlDirty flag behavior must be preserved (onChangeCapture pattern or explicit equivalent)
30-second polling interval must continue to work after extraction
Publisher step polling (start/stop) must remain coupled to autoPublisher.running state

change_impact.risk: medium — large file moves but no logic changes; lint + tsc + test gate required

acceptance_criteria: npm run test — all existing tests pass
All 16 new files exist and have coherent single-responsibility
No import cycles or circular dependencies
Visual output unchanged (manual smoke test: sidebar nav, header, overview page render)

execution_phases.name: Types + Utils
execution_phases.description: Extract control panel types, applyRuntimePreset, gapPolicySourceLabel, stripTaggedErrorPrefix to src/lib/controlPanel.ts
execution_phases.verification: tsc --noEmit passes, no import errors in App.tsx

execution_phases.name: Custom Hooks
execution_phases.description: Extract all fetch* functions into useAppData hook. Extract publisher polling into usePublisherPoll hook. App.tsx consumes hooks instead of inline functions.
execution_phases.verification: Polling still starts/stops correctly with autoPublisher.running. 30s interval continues.

execution_phases.name: Modals
execution_phases.description: Extract LogDetailModal and OverrideConfirmModal to src/components/. Pass selectedLog/showOverrideModal as props.
execution_phases.verification: Modal open/close behavior unchanged. Escape/backdrop dismiss works.

execution_phases.name: Pages
execution_phases.description: Extract OverviewPage, ControlsPage, OperationsPage, PublisherRunsPage. Each page receives props from hooks/App state.
execution_phases.verification: Each route renders identically. controlDirty + saveControlPanel wiring intact on ControlsPage.

execution_phases.name: Sub-Components
execution_phases.description: Extract KpiStrip, TrendInsightsChart, ControlPanelForm, CompetitorTable, DraftCards, PublisherRunsLog, AppSidebar from page components.
execution_phases.verification: No visual regression. ControlPanelForm onChange still sets controlDirty.

execution_phases.name: Route Shell
execution_phases.description: App.tsx reduced to sidebar + header + route conditional rendering (~50-80 lines).
execution_phases.verification: All 5 routes render correctly. NavLink active states preserved.

execution_phases.name: Verification Gate
execution_phases.description: Run npm run lint, tsc --noEmit, npm run test. Manual smoke test.
execution_phases.verification: All gates pass. Commit with descriptive message.

session_boundary.rationale: Phase 1-2 extract the data layer (types, utils, hooks). Once hooks are clean, Phase 3-6 is purely component extraction — a different cognitive mode. Handover after Phase 2 gives the next session a clean data API to work against.
session_boundary.next_session_starts_at: Phase 3 — Extract modals, then pages, then sub-components
